channel.title: Maine Judicial Branch Court Fees Schedule
channel.description: Official schedule of filing/entry fees and fee-related administrative order links; prose+link page with no repeating dated list, monitored by full-page fingerprint so fee changes surface as page-change items.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Judicial Branch Court Fees Schedule
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
